criteria.criterion: M97-1: ARCHITECTURE.md directory structure covers ≥95% of actual source files
M97-2: ARCHITECTURE.md has no stale CR content; all implemented modules documented
M97-3: vision.json and prd.json gap statuses match actual implementation state
M97-6: Fresh dbb.json evaluation run with match score recorded
M97-7: All 4 agentic-* packages resolve from package.json deps (no import map refs in src/)
M97-8: Test pass rate ≥90% (currently ~94% based on batch testing: 775/824)
M97-9: src/index.js entry point exists (package.json main field)
M97-10: README default port matches code default (1234)
